title: haumaniastrum quarrei
intro: Haumaniastrum quarrei, also known as Qingmao, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Haumaniastrum quarrei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Haumaniastrum quarrei is typically prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions for use in traditional medicine.
